channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Dladla backs Chiefs co-coaches Kaze and Ben Youssef to continue amid rebuilding phase
item.description: Former Kaizer Chiefs midfielder Josta Dladla has come out in support of current co-coaches Cedric Kaze and Khalil Ben Youssef, urging the club’s management to give them more time as they continue rebu...

item.title: Tash spotted playing pool with friends after Betty Bayo’s children relocate to Pastor Kanyari’s home
item.description: A recent video showing Hiram Gitau, also known as Tash, has surfaced online just days after Betty Bayo’s children moved in with their biological father, Pastor Victor Kanyari. Tash had been taking car...

item.title: US moves to reclassify marijuana and ease federal restrictions on cannabis industry
item.description: The United States Department of Justice has announced a significant shift in its approach to marijuana, signalling one of the most substantial changes in federal drug policy in decades. The government...

item.title: Letters to the Editor: Assessing Trudeau’s Legacy and Ideological Shifts in Canadian Politics
item.description: In this edition of Letters to the Editor from April 25, several readers offer their perspectives on Justin Trudeau’s legacy, his post-office behaviour, and compare his time in office to that of his pr...

item.title: Cory Bernardi reimburses Gina Rinehart for election campaign flights to comply with SA donation laws
item.description: Cory Bernardi, former Liberal senator and newly elected member of the South Australian Legislative Council, has reimbursed more than $40,000 to Gina Rinehart's company, S Kidman & Co, for private flig...

item.title: Sama Kenya Lays Off Over 1,000 Employees; Some Staff Raise Concerns Over Unequal Compensation
item.description: Sama Kenya, a business process outsourcing firm based in Nairobi, has terminated the contracts of 1,108 employees following Meta's cancellation of a major data annotation contract. The layoffs, which ...

item.title: Army Recovers Remains of Slain Soldier and Fiancée Four Years After Abduction in Imo
item.description: Four years after the tragic death of Master Warrant Officer (retd) Linus Musa Audu and Lance Corporal Gloria Mathew, the Nigerian Army has recovered their remains in Imo State. The couple, who were se...

item.title: Luis Gatmaitan to lead UST Paz Latorena Memorial Lecture on literature and healing
item.description: Acclaimed Filipino children’s book author and medical doctor Luis Gatmaitan, also known by his pen name “Tito Dok,” is set to deliver the 2026 Paz Latorena Memorial Lecture at the University of Santo ...

item.title: KUTRRH Opens 40 Positions Across Various Medical and Support Departments
item.description: Kenyatta University Teaching, Referral and Research Hospital (KUTRRH) has officially opened applications for 40 positions across different medical and support departments. The hospital, which is a pub...

item.title: Reintegration of 744 Former Terrorists Raises Concerns Over Security and Community Safety
item.description: Nigeria don dey face wahala wey no dey end, from Boko Haram, kidnappers, bandits to other criminal activities. Just last week, military announce say dem don graduate and reintegrate 744 former terrori...

item.title: Life of Daniel Kinahan’s wife under scrutiny after his arrest in Dubai
item.description: The article examines the situation of Caoimhe Kinahan following the arrest of her husband, Daniel Kinahan, in Dubai on organised crime charges. Kinahan, long suspected by international authorities of ...

item.title: Two Women Arrested Over Alleged Vandalism at Heidelberg RSL on Anzac Day
item.description: Two women have been charged after allegedly defacing the Heidelberg RSL in Melbourne's northeast on Anzac Day. The incident took place at around 1:45 AM on Saturday when the two women were caught spra...

item.title: King Kanja Unveils Afro-Fusion Single Daima Mkenya Highlighting Kenyan Culture and Unity
item.description: Kenyan artiste King Kanja, currently based in the US, has released his latest Afro-fusion single 'Daima Mkenya,' a song that celebrates Kenyan identity, culture, and national unity. Known for blending...

item.title: McDavid shines, but Oilers' defence falters in Game 3 loss
item.description: Connor McDavid scored his first goal of the playoffs and registered his first multi-point game, but the Edmonton Oilers’ defensive struggles continued in a 7-4 loss to the Anaheim Ducks in Game 3 of t...

item.title: Rethinking Ph.D. Research: From Thesis to Real-World Impact
item.description: Traditionally, the completion of a Ph.D. thesis was regarded as the ultimate marker of academic achievement, showcasing a scholar's depth of knowledge, originality, and discipline. The thesis represen...

item.title: Sari-sari stores boost inventory and sales as fuel crisis drives consumer stockpiling
item.description: Lumaki nang malaki ang benta ng mga sari-sari store sa Pilipinas noong Marso 2026, ayon sa datos ng tech startup na Packworks, na nakabase sa mahigit isang milyong transaksyon mula sa kanilang Sari.PH...

item.title: Trump Administration Considering Expansion of Refugee Programme for Afrikaners
item.description: The Trump administration is reportedly considering expanding the US refugee programme to allow more white South Africans, specifically Afrikaners, to be resettled. This comes after the US reduced its ...

item.title: How China Uses Quiet Diplomacy to Isolate Taiwan and Shape Global Influence
item.description: This opinion piece by Owei Lakemfa look at how China dey apply soft, strategic diplomacy instead of open force to pursue its global interests, especially regarding Taiwan. The writer explain say Taiwa...

item.title: Princess Anne attends London dawn service for ANZAC Day commemorations
item.description: The Princess Royal, Princess Anne, attended a dawn service in London to mark ANZAC Day, a significant day of remembrance for Australians and New Zealanders who served and died in military operations. ...

item.title: Surge in participation and social running drives unprecedented growth of the London Marathon
item.description: The London Marathon continues to grow at an extraordinary pace, with a record 59,000 runners expected to take part and nearly £100 million projected to be raised for charity. Participation demand has ...
